note: Real source of SecUSo Privacy Friendly To-Do List, pinned at tag v3.4.0. Not the whole app (94 Kotlin files spanning Room DB, ViewModels, RecyclerView adapters, calendar/widget UI, CSV/Markdown export, backup-api) -- an acyclic real SUBGRAPH covering the distinctive behaviors this app was picked for: AlarmManager-scheduled reminders (util/AlarmMgr.kt, real android.app.AlarmManager calls), JobScheduler dispatch (service/JobManager.kt, service/JobInstanceMultiplier.kt, service/JobBase.kt, service/JobFactory.kt, service/ModelJobBase.kt, service/HandleAlarmJob.kt, service/UpdateAlarmsJob.kt, service/NotificationJob.kt), and the boot-completed + notification-action receivers (receiver/AutoStartReceiver.kt, receiver/AlarmReceiver.kt, receiver/NotificationReceiver.kt), plus util/LogTag.kt and util/Timestamp.kt (the app's real time-calculation helper, referenced by AlarmMgr/HandleAlarmJob/UpdateAlarmsJob). Same acyclic-subgraph technique as pedometer/sora-editor-lib: pin real leaf files, author minimal scaffolding only where the real files reference the Room-backed data layer or UI they don't otherwise need -- model/TodoTask.kt and model/ModelServices.kt are authored stand-in interfaces (TodoTask's two enums are copied verbatim from the real file because Timestamp.kt's real recurrence-date logic switches on them), viewmodel/CustomViewModel.kt drops the coroutine/Model.createServices() wiring, util/NotificationMgr.kt and util/PreferenceMgr.kt are trimmed to the one call each real Job class makes (dropping the real notification-channel/TaskStackBuilder/preferences plumbing), and view/MainActivity.kt is a stand-in launcher Activity. Excludes :backup-api (same rationale as 2048/pedometer) and the widget/calendar/CSV/Markdown/PIN features (unused by this subgraph). Real strings.xml and the mdpi launcher icon are vendored as-is (only mdpi density, same as ruler/2048/pedometer); AndroidManifest.xml and values/styles.xml are scaffolding, not vendored -- the real styles.xml pulls in custom theme attrs (secusoLogoDrawable, appColorNavBarHeaderBackground) and androidx.core.splashscreen that this subgraph doesn't use. No androidx needed beyond appcompat/material for the manifest theme -- the vendored subgraph itself is plain android.app.* (AlarmManager, JobScheduler, BroadcastReceiver).
note_on_edit_01: Real upstream history for this exact subgraph is awkward to PR-mine: the only self-contained commit touching HandleAlarmJob (5608658, 'Added different messages for passed, todays and approaching deadline') predates the util/Timestamp.kt refactor (4e3638c) that this pin already includes, so applying it as a patch would require reverting the whole subgraph to the pre-Timestamp 'Helper' class shape. Rather than force that, edit 01 is an AUTHORED (not PR-mined) small method-add against the real, vendored AlarmMgr.kt -- flagged honestly here rather than mis-labeled as real. If a cleaner real edit is found later, this can be swapped without touching the vendor pin.
